title: Memory Provenance
description: Provenance fields required on every auto-memory topic file. MEMORY.md (the index) is exempt; only topic files carry provenance.

source.description: Input origin that produced this memory entry.

trigger.description: Human-readable reason the entry was written (e.g. user correction, inferred from conversation).

session_id.description: UUID of the agent session that produced the write.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 instant when the entry was written.

author_model.description: Claude model id that authored the entry.

adminSources.description: Sources considered admin-trusted. Non-admin sources are rejected from long-term memory.
